channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: 666ghj / MiroFish
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 29,883 → 30,235 (+352) | Ranked #1
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
Language: Python 3,260 stars today

item.title: thedotmack / claude-mem
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 36,732 → 36,948 (+216) | Ranked #2
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
Language: TypeScript 1,045 stars today

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions / project-nomad
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 1,786 → 1,884 (+98) | Ranked #3
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
Language: TypeScript 775 stars today

item.title: obra / superpowers
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 88,482 → 88,906 (+424) | Ranked #4
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
Language: Shell 3,152 stars today

item.title: abhigyanpatwari / GitNexus
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 15,562 → 15,700 (+138) | Ranked #5
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
Language: TypeScript 1,860 stars today

item.title: lightpanda-io / browser
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 20,177 → 20,321 (+144) | Ranked #6
Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation
Language: Zig 2,086 stars today

item.title: volcengine / OpenViking
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 14,082 → 14,267 (+185) | Ranked #7
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
Language: Python 2,012 stars today

item.title: shareAI-lab / learn-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 29,260 → 29,428 (+168) | Ranked #8
Bash is all you need - A nano Claude Code–like agent, built from 0 to 1
Language: TypeScript 1,535 stars today

item.title: p-e-w / heretic
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 15,263 → 15,333 (+70) | Ranked #9
Fully automatic censorship removal for language models
Language: Python 788 stars today

item.title: langchain-ai / deepagents
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 12,847 → 13,053 (+206) | Ranked #10
Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.
Language: Python 1,026 stars today

item.title: YishenTu / claudian
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 4,138 → 4,214 (+76) | Ranked #11
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault
Language: TypeScript 111 stars today

item.title: voidzero-dev / vite-plus
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 2,222 → 2,289 (+67) | Ranked #12
Vite+ is the unified toolchain and entry point for web development. It manages your runtime, package manager, and frontend toolchain in one place.
Language: Rust 621 stars today
